A real person, handling your marketing.

No account managers. No offshore teams. No sales pitch. Just one engineer doing the technical marketing work your business needs.

[FOUNDER_HEADSHOT]

Why Copper Beacon exists.

I'm [FOUNDER_NAME], an engineer by training. Before starting Copper Beacon, I built and grew a home services business to nearly $800,000 in revenue. I learned firsthand what small business owners actually need when it comes to marketing — and more importantly, what they don't need.

What they don't need: agencies that speak in jargon, send vague monthly reports, and charge for "strategy" meetings that go nowhere. What they don't need: someone who's never run a business telling them how to run theirs.

What they do need: someone technical, competent, and accountable who handles the search visibility, Google Business Profile, reviews, and online reputation work — so the business owner can focus on the actual business.

That's what Copper Beacon is. No pitch decks. No long-term contracts. Just honest technical work that brings more customers in the door.

Why operator experience matters.

Most marketing agencies are started by marketers. That sounds obvious — until you realize that marketers often haven't run a service business, hired crews, managed cash flow, or lost sleep over a slow month. Copper Beacon is different: the founder spent years operating a service business before moving into digital marketing. That changes what we build, what we recommend, and how we talk to clients.

How we work.

Transparent

Clear deliverables, honest reporting, no mystery charges. You always know what's being done and what it's producing.

Measured

We optimize for outcomes that matter — calls, bookings, revenue — not vanity metrics like traffic spikes and keyword rankings.

Steady

Local SEO and AI search visibility are long games. We focus on compounding results month over month, not overnight wins that don't last.

Ready to let the customers find you?

Fifteen minutes. No pitch. Just a real conversation about whether we can help.

Book a free 15-minute call
Copper Beacon

You run the business. We bring the customers.

hello@copperbeacon.com
